name: stream-events
description: Stream SSE events from a running agent execution
query: I have a running agent, can you stream its events so I can see what it's doing?
expected_behavior: Ask for the execution ID or find running executions
Explain the event types (tool_call, thinking, guardrail_pass, done)
Show how to stream programmatically with rt.stream()
success_criteria: Offers both CLI and SDK streaming options
